# tf_publish_oci_flux

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Push a module as a Flux-compatible OCI artifact for GitOps.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_publish_oci_flux")

tf_publish_oci_flux(
    name = "push_oci",
    module = ":my_module",
    stack_name = "aws/hub",
)
```

The push uses ORAS with the CNCF Flux media types and the
`org.opencontainers.image.source` / `revision` annotations a Flux
`OCIRepository` consumes.

See [Flux (GitOps) Overview](README.md) for more information.
